name: ai-dev-assistant-bridge
description: Supercharge AI-assisted coding with auto-continue reminders, auto-approval, task management, and context injection for GitHub Copilot and other AI tools

commands.title: AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Show Status
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Toggle Auto-Continue
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Run Now (Manual Trigger)
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Get Current Port
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Change Port
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Add Task
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Manage Tasks
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Add Guiding Document
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Remove Guiding Document
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Manage Guiding Documents
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Add Custom Auto-Continue Category
AI Dev Assistant Bridge: Manage Custom Categories

chatParticipants.name: agent
chatParticipants.description: Enhances AI-assisted coding with task management and auto-continue reminders

languageModelTools.name: report_completion
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Report the result of a dispatched task back to the originating system. Call this tool when you finish working on a task that was dispatched via the AI Feedback Bridge (look for a queueId in the task metadata). Provide the taskId (the queueId from the dispatch), the final status, a summary of what was done, and optionally findings, blockers, or questions.

taskId.description: The queue ID of the dispatched task (from the queueId in task metadata)

summary.description: Brief summary of what was accomplished or why it failed

nextQuestions.description: Questions back to the task submitter

languageModelTools.name: report_progress
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Report interim progress on a dispatched task back to the originating system. Call this tool periodically while working on long tasks dispatched via the AI Feedback Bridge to provide real-time visibility. Use the queueId from the task metadata as the taskId.

taskId.description: The queue ID of the dispatched task (from the queueId in task metadata)

update.description: Description of current progress or what is being worked on

languageModelTools.name: report_observation
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Report a lightweight observation back to the originating system without completing the task. Use this when you notice something noteworthy during work — an anomaly, a pattern, a potential issue — that Goltana should know about but that doesn't constitute task completion or progress.

taskId.description: Optional queue ID of the current task (from the queueId in task metadata)

observation.description: What you observed — an anomaly, pattern, potential issue, or insight

severity.description: How important is this observation (default: info)

languageModelTools.name: query_goltana
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Ask Goltana (the AI orchestrator) a question and get a synchronous response. Use this to get clarification, context, or guidance from Goltana before making decisions — especially for ambiguous tasks, when you need project context, or want to know about related work. You can also query a specific agent by providing agentId.

question.description: The question to ask Goltana — be specific about what context or guidance you need

agentId.description: Optional agent ID to query instead of Goltana (e.g. 'devops', 'qa')

languageModelTools.name: get_related_tasks
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetch tasks from Goltana's task system to understand what other work is pending, running, or completed in the same area. Useful for avoiding duplicate work, understanding dependencies, or checking if related tasks have already been addressed.

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return (default: 20)

languageModelTools.name: request_approval
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Request approval from Goltana before taking a risky or impactful action. This creates an inbox item in Goltana's system that requires human or AI review before proceeding. Use for destructive operations, major refactors, deployments, or any action where you are uncertain about the right approach.

title.description: Short title for the approval request (e.g. 'Delete unused database tables')

context.description: Full context explaining what you want to do and why approval is needed

blocking.description: Whether this blocks further work until approved (default: true)

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoContinue.includ.description: Include pending tasks in reminder messages

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoContinue.improv.default: Focus on code improvements and optimizations

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoContinue.covera.default: Review code coverage and add tests where needed

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoContinue.robust.default: Prioritize code robustness and error handling

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoContinue.cleanu.description: 🧹 Cleanup: Remove unused code and files

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoContinue.cleanu.default: Cleanup unused files and dead code

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoContinue.commit.default: Commit your progress with clear messages

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoApproval.enable.description: Enable auto-approval monitoring (requires manual console script setup)

aiDevAssistantBridge.autoApproval.autoIn.description: Automatically inject approval script on startup (experimental)

aiDevAssistantBridge.guidingDocuments.description: Project documents to include as AI context (architecture, conventions, etc.)

aiDevAssistantBridge.guidingDocuments.ma.description: Maximum size (chars) for each guiding document to include in context

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
